text.title: Figma vs Adobe Strategy 2026 Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the decision-record artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.code: { "recommendation": "figma+firefly", "scores": { "collaboration": 9, "asset_gen": 8, "handoff": 9, "agent_api": 7, "total_cost": 7 }, "migration_cost_usd": 18000, "agent_endpoints": [ "figma:GET /v1/files/:key", "firefly:POST /v3/images/generate" ], "revisit_date": "2026-11-22", "rationale": "12-person product team; needs collaboration + commercial-safe imagery; Firefly REST covers asset gen; Figma REST covers handoff audit." }

example.note: Out-of-enum recommendation; empty scores; negative migration cost; missing rationale.

forbidden.pattern: Output MUST NOT contain placeholder values listed in the validator script PLACEHOLDERS set. Reject any field whose value matches case-insensitively.
